objective: Achieve internally self-sustaining population dynamics without lowering world difficulty.

completed_steps.name: Founder population search
completed_steps.result: Best current founder region is around 250.

completed_steps.name: Direct projected-energy storage fix
completed_steps.result: Confirmed bug, but direct fix worsened long-run outcomes.

completed_steps.name: Household economy redesign
completed_steps.result: Best recent intervention; restored performance close to baseline and produced gen9 runs.

completed_steps.name: Aggressive settlement overshoot suppression
completed_steps.result: Collapsed performance; mean max generation fell to 1.0.

completed_steps.name: Anti-cohort reproduction cooldown
completed_steps.result: Collapsed births too hard; mean max generation fell to 2.5.

completed_steps.name: Adult household withdrawal alignment
completed_steps.result: Mixed result. Some seeds improved strongly, but aggregate performance stayed below household-redesign-only performance.

completed_steps.name: Breeder-priority household allocation
completed_steps.result: Best aggregate result so far. Mean max generation rose to 7.5 and non-extinct runs rose to 8/10.

completed_steps.name: Active-nest-only support filtering
completed_steps.result: Reduced food inflation but did not produce stable runs; deep long-loop seeds generally worsened.

completed_steps.name: Household-linked active nest probe
completed_steps.result: Too aggressive. Probe seeds collapsed around generation 2.

completed_steps.name: Nest inheritance transfer
completed_steps.result: Naive nest ownership transfer destabilized the household graph and collapsed probe seeds near generation 2.

completed_steps.name: Juvenile and young-adult pipeline priority
completed_steps.result: Mixed but still below the best current breeder-priority long-loop baseline.

open_suspicions.title: Adult emergency withdrawal uses self.agent_id instead of household nest owner
evidence: Adults store and reproduce against household-aware nest resolution, but withdrawal uses self.agent_id
Matches the paradox of high stored food with many energy_depleted deaths and low_energy failures
A direct household-aware withdrawal fix produced strong gains in some seeds but not a clear aggregate win
A breeder-priority allocation rule produced the strongest aggregate result in the current investigation stage

open_suspicions.title: Nest creation injects food directly
evidence: Each new nest starts with food_storage=18
In best redesign run, nest seeding alone explains about 46.5% of stored food total

open_suspicions.title: Nest support scales with nest count and inflates surplus
evidence: Every nest gets support-food and local spawn chances
More nests can mean more ecological support even while population declines

current_best_state.keep_patch: household economy redesign + breeder-priority household allocation
current_best_state.next_recommended_test: parameter search around breeder-priority household constants
